[b]此牌被丢弃时会返回手卡,被消耗时会返回手卡[/b]
回合开始时选择1张抽牌，手牌，弃牌里的[color=#CC6666]【轮回】[/color]卡消耗，获得[color=#CC6666]【伪证】[/color]时减少1层，打出攻击牌时额外获得20[b]【魔女化】[/b]，回合结束时减少相当于[color=#CC6666]【正义】[/color]的血量，获得3层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]

使目标获得100层[b]【魔女化】[/b]，1层[gold]【共犯】[/gold]，1层[b]【魔女仪式】[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_POWERFOURFOURCARD.desc: 回合开始时获得40层[b]【魔女化】[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_JUSTICE_ENFORCER.title: 正义的执行者
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_JUSTICE_ENFORCER.descr:
[color=#CC6666]原罪[/color]
消耗手牌中所有[color=#CC6666]【轮回】[/color]卡，每张生成随机[color=#CC6666]【轮回】[/color]卡，获得1层[color=#CC6666]【伪证】[/color]并回复1点生命
消耗所有[color=#CC6666]【伪证】[/color]，每层对随机敌人造成2+[b]【魔女化】[/b]1半点伤害，获得等量[color=#CC6666]【正义】[/color]
消耗所有[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，每层获得15层[b]【魔女化】[/b]并回复1点能量
按照[color=#CC6666]【正义】[/color]层数全体回血，≥10层则所有手牌获得[color=#CC6666]【轮回】[/color]
若[b]【魔女化】[/b]≥100，额外获得1层[color=#CC6666]【原罪】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_LYHELP.title: 蕾雅的协力
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_LYHELP.description: 选择1个敌人将其意图目标转给1个敌方，造成8点伤害
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AMTARGET.title: 希罗的针对
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AMTARGET.description: 使1个友方失去3点血量，全体获得3层[color=#CC6666]【正义】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AMHELP.title: 艾玛的协力
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AMHELP.description: 自身失去3点血量，使全体队友获得{Block:diff()}点护盾，恢复{HealAmount:diff()}点血量
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_XHELP.title: 雪的协力
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_XHELP.description: 给予目标{Block:diff()}点格挡，给予全体队友{JusticePower:diff()}层[color=#CC6666]【正义】[/color]，获得1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，若目标[b]【魔女化】[/b]≥50，消耗10%[b]【魔女化】[/b]换取护盾
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHADOW_SLASH.title: 残影斩
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHADOW_SLASH.descripti: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，若本回合通过[color=#CC6666]【轮回】[/color]打出过卡牌，额外造成{BonusDamage:diff()}点伤害
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ATTACKSIXSIX.title: 终审
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ATTACKSIXSIX.descripti: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，若本回合已打出3张攻击牌，获得1层[color=#CC6666]【审判链】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYM.title: 城崎诺亚
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYM.description:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，获得1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，获得10层[b]【魔女化】[/b]，给予目标2层
[blue]【城崎诺亚的魔法】[/blue]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_KKM.title: 泽度可可
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_KKM.description:
选择1个友方造成1点伤害，使其获得{KkmPower:diff()}层
[color=#ff9966]【泽度可可的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYXM.title: 黑部奈叶香
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYXM.description:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害,获得1层
[color=#999999]【黑部奈叶香的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AMM.title: 樱羽艾玛
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AMM.description:
造成{Damage:diff()}+[b]【嫌疑】[/b]层数+[b]【魔女化】[/b]÷20点伤害,获得1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]和10层[b]【魔女化】[/b]
获得[color=#ff99cc]【樱羽艾玛的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AAM.title: 夏目安安
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_AAM.description:
获得3层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，选择1个敌人获得
[color=#6666cc]【夏目安安的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_MARK.title: 魔女印记
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_MARK.description: 回合结束时若在手牌中，获得{WithPower:diff()}层[b]【魔女化】[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_BURN.title: 魔女灼烧
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_BURN.description:
回合开始时返回手牌
回合结束时对自己造成{Damage}点伤害
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYM_SLASH.title: 诺亚的协力
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYM_SLASH.description: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，给予目标{NymPower:diff()}层[blue]【城崎诺亚的魔法】[/blue]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_REVOKATION.title: 魔女化
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_REVOKATION.description:
降低3点血量上限，造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害
可选择抽牌堆、弃牌堆或手牌中的1张[color=#CC6666]【死亡回溯】[/color]消耗，移除自身的[color=#CC6666]【死亡回溯】[/color]能力
若成功消耗卡牌或移除能力，加入1张[b]保留[/b]的[color=#CC6666]【正义】[/color]进入手牌
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PERJURY_AURA.title: 昭雪
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BULLET_CARD.title: 子弹
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCHRESTCEREMONY.desc: 获得{RitualCeremonyPower:diff()}层[b]【魔女仪式】[/b]，获得{WithPower:diff()}层[b]【魔女化】[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMALIN_ATTACK.title: 打击
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMALIN_DEFEND.title: 防御
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CROSSBOW_BOLT.title: 弩枪的箭矢
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CROSSBOW_BOLT.descript: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。如果目标是攻击意图，伤害翻倍
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BROKEN_DOOR_LOCK.title: 坏掉的门锁
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BROKEN_DOOR_LOCK.descr: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。此伤害无视护盾
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BURNT_MARKS.title: 烧焦的痕迹
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BURNT_MARKS.descriptio: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。对所有敌人造成3点伤害
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_UNDERGROUND_FREEZER.de: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。目标失去1点力量
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYX_GUN.title: 奈叶香的枪
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NYX_GUN.description: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。如果本回合打出[color=#339966]反驳[/color]卡大于3，额外命中1个敌人
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_SKETCHBOOK.title: 安安的素描本
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_SKETCHBOOK.descrip: 检视抽牌堆顶部{Cards:diff()}张牌，选择1张加入手牌
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_SKETCHBOOK.upgrade: 检视抽牌堆顶部 {Cards} 张牌，选择 2 张加入手牌
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SMALL_KEY.title: 小钥匙
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SMALL_KEY.description: 抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。本回合下1张[color=#cc9966]疑问[/color]牌费用减1
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HANNA_RECORDING.title: 昨晚的照片
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HANNA_RECORDING.descri: 获得{Energy:diff()}点能量。选择弃牌堆1张牌再次打出
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CONTROL_PANEL.title: 控制面板
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DATA.title: 便签条
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DATA.description: 抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。本回合所有[color=#cc9966]疑问[/color]牌费用变为0
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BLOODY_HEADBAND.title: 沾血的发带
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BLOODY_HEADBAND.descri: 获得{Block:diff()}点格挡。1名同伴获得{AllyBlock:diff()}点格挡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_TORTURE_SHOW_INVITE.de: 全体同伴获得{Block:diff()}点格挡。如果本回合[color=#6699cc]赞同[/color]计数大于2，额外获得4点格挡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PRISON_BLUEPRINT.title: 典狱长的雕像
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PRISON_BLUEPRINT.descr: 每当你打出[color=#6699cc]赞同[/color]牌，获得1点格挡。同伴获得2点格挡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CANDLE.title: 蜡烛
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CANDLE.description: 获得 {Block:diff()} 点格挡。随机1名同伴回复 3 点生命。全体队友获得 {Energy:diff()} 点能量
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PISTOL.title: 手枪
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PISTOL.description: 1名同伴获得{StrengthPower:diff()}点力量。获得{Block:diff()}点格挡
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。本回合每打过1张[color=#6699cc]赞同[/color]/[color=#339966]反驳[/color]/[color=#cc9966]疑问[/color]附魔牌，额外造成2点伤害
造成 7 点伤害。本回合每打出过1张[color=#6699cc]赞同[/color]/[color=#339966]反驳[/color]/[color=#cc9966]疑问[/color]附魔牌，额外造成 3 点伤害
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ACCOMPLICE_SILENCE.des: 获得{Energy:diff()}点能量。如果本回合打过[color=#6699cc]赞同[/color]和[color=#339966]反驳[/color]，全体队友额外获得1点能量
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PRISON_LAW.title: 监狱的法则
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PRISON_LAW.description: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。如果本回合打过[color=#cc9966]疑问[/color]牌，伤害+{Damage:diff()}
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_FAKE_DEATH.title: 自杀的真相
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_FAKE_DEATH.description: 抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。如果本回合打出3种附魔牌，改为抽4张牌，队友回复2点生命,全体队友获得2点能量
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMALIN_REST_CEREMONY.d: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。本回合每打过1种附魔牌，伤害+10
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_TRIAL.title: 魔女裁判
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_TRIAL.descriptio:
每回合开始时
[color=#6699cc]赞同[/color]/[color=#339966]反驳[/color]/[color=#cc9966]疑问[/color]附魔的计数器+1
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_INVESTIGATION.title: 搜查
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_INVESTIGATION.descript: 每回合开始时，检视抽牌堆顶部 {Stacks:diff()} 张牌，可选择弃掉或放回
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_TRUE_CRIMINAL.title: 真犯人
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_TRUE_CRIMINAL.descript: 同1回合打出[color=#6699cc]赞同[/color]/[color=#339966]反驳[/color]/[color=#cc9966]疑问[/color]附魔牌达到5的倍数时，令生命值最低的敌人失去15点生命
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_MLLM.title: 冰上梅露露
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_MLLM.description: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，给予目标{MllmPower:diff()}层[color=#ffcc99]【冰上梅露露的魔法】[/color]，获得{SuspectPower:diff()}层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_MGM.title: 宝生玛格
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_MGM.description: 获得{SuspectPower:diff()}层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，获得{Block:diff()}点格挡，获得{MgmPower:diff()}层[purple]【宝生玛格的魔法】[/purple]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_LYM.title: 莲见蕾雅
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_LYM.description: 获得4层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，给予目标[gold]【莲见蕾雅的魔法】[/gold]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_NYXM.title: 黑部奈叶香
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_NYXM.description: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，获得1层[color=#999999]【黑部奈叶香的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_KKM.title: 泽度可可
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_KKM.description: 选择1个友方造成1点伤害，使其获得{KkmPower:diff()}层[color=#ff9966]【泽度可可的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_NYM.title: 城崎诺亚
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_NYM.description: 造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，获得1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]和10层[b]【魔女化】[/b]，给予目标2层[blue]【城崎诺亚的魔法】[/blue]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_AMM.title: 樱羽艾玛
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_AMM.description: 场上所有敌方单位获得等于其最大生命值5%层数的[color=#ff99cc]【魔女因子】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_AAM.title: 夏目安安
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_AAM.description: 获得3层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，选择1个敌人获得[color=#6666cc]【夏目安安的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_TEN.title: 二阶堂希罗
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_TEN.description: 获得 {SuspectPower} 层嫌疑。获得1层[color=#CC6666]【二阶堂希罗的魔法】[/color]。移除所有同名卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_TWELVE.title: 紫藤亚里沙
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_TWELVE.description: 减少1个友方{ConsumeAmount:diff()}层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，获得{Energy:diff()}点能量，自己获得{SuspectPower:diff()}层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，获得1层[color=#ff0000]【紫藤亚里沙的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_FRIEND.title: 朋友
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_FRIEND.description:
获得1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，选择1张[color=#33ccff]【橘雪莉】{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/color]
或[green]【远野汉娜】{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/green]加入手卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_THESWAPLIE.title: 换身的谎言
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_THESWAPLIE.description: 抽 {Cards:diff()} 张牌。如果本回合疑问达到2，选择手牌中 {TransformCount:diff()} 张牌，将其变化为本角色卡池中1张同稀有度的随机牌
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ENCHANT_TRANSFORM.desc: 选择1张手牌获得重放。如果本回合[color=#339966]反驳[/color]为3，选择1张手牌读取其附魔，再从牌组中选择任意张带有相同附魔的卡进行变化
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SWAP_BODY_SUCCESS.desc:
[color=#cc9966][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]
获得1张目标零费随机卡
若[color=#cc9966]「亲近」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
目标额外获得1张零费随机卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_BALLOON_FRAGMENTS.desc:
[color=#cc9966][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，获得{Block:diff()}点格挡
若[color=#cc9966]疏远[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
施加2层虚弱
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_GUARDIAN_OATH.title: 守护的誓言
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_GUARDIAN_OATH.descript:
[color=#ff0000][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]
对随机目标施加3层[color=#ff0000]【紫藤亚里沙的魔法】[/color]。若目标是队友：获得 {Energy:diff()}点能量，
若[color=#ff0000]「亲近」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
再回复1点生命。若目标是敌人：施加1层易伤
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHARED_FATE.title: 命运的共鸣
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHARED_FATE.descriptio:
[color=#33ccff][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]
获得{XlmPower:diff()}层[color=#33ccff]【橘雪莉的魔法】[/color]
若[color=#33ccff]「亲近」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
全体友方获得5点力量
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DOLL_GIFT.title: 玩偶的心意
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_DOLL_GIFT.description:
[green][b]「亲近」[/b][/green]
获得1层缓冲
若[green]「亲近」[/green]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
全体友方也获得1层缓冲
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_STABBING_BLADE.title: 背叛的利刃
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_STABBING_BLADE.descrip:
[green][b]「疏远」[/b][/green]
选择1张攻击卡附魔[b]【魔女化】[/b]
若[green]「疏远」[/green]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
立刻打出1次该卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SHATTERED_RESONANCE.de:
[color=#33ccff][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
获得1层[green]【远野汉娜的魔法】[/green]。全体敌人获得{StrGain:diff()}点力量
若[color=#33ccff]「疏远」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
全体敌人降低10点力量
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_CLEANSING.title: 可悲的自虐
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_WITCH_CLEANSING.descri:
[color=#ff0000][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
对自己造成5点伤害。移除全体友方四分之1的【魔女化】
若[color=#ff0000]「疏远」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
移除的[b]【魔女化】[/b]转移到自己身上
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_THE_ONLY_CLUE.title: 利用的背后
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_THE_ONLY_CLUE.descript:
[color=#999999][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]
获得2层[color=#999999]【黑部奈叶香的魔法】[/color]，抽2张牌弃1张
若[color=#999999]「亲近」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
弃掉的牌获得重放
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CHAINED_TRUST.title: 戒备的内心
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_CHAINED_TRUST.descript:
[color=#999999][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
获得{NyxmStacks:diff()}层[color=#999999]【黑部奈叶香的魔法】[/color]，回收弃牌堆1张牌
若[color=#999999]「疏远」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
从牌组随机打出1张攻击牌
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUBSTITUTE_COST.title: 虚假的共犯
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_SUBSTITUTE_COST.descri:
[color=#ffcc99][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]
本回合攻击牌伤害+亲近层数，下回合失去2点能量
若[color=#ffcc99]「亲近」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
下回合获得{GainEnergy:diff()}点能量
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PAWN_REALIZATION.title: 棋子的觉悟
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_PAWN_REALIZATION.descr:
[color=#ffcc99][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
对自己造成等同疏远层数的伤害，获得等同疏远层数两倍的护盾
若[color=#ffcc99]「疏远」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
额外获得1层[color=#ffcc99]【冰上梅露露的魔法】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NOAH_AFFINITY.title: 水之茧
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NOAH_AFFINITY.descript:
[blue][b]「亲近」[/b][/blue]
攻击任意敌人 {Damage:diff()} 等于亲近次数
若[blue]「亲近」[/blue]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
先随机给予[blue]【城崎诺亚的魔法】[/blue]再攻击
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_NOAH_ESTRANGEMENT.desc:
[blue][b]「疏远」[/b][/blue]
选择1张手卡获得重放，丢弃1张手牌
若[blue]「疏远」[/blue]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
获得1层[blue]【蝴蝶】[/blue]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MARGARET_AFFINITY.desc:
[purple][b]「亲近」[/b][/purple]
获得 {MgmStacks:diff()}层[purple]【宝生玛格的魔法】[/purple]，本回合承受队友受到的伤害，下回合给予选择的队友等于本回合受到伤害的护盾
若[purple]「亲近」[/purple]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
下回合你也获得等于受到伤害的护盾
[purple][b]「疏远」[/b][/purple]
选择1个队友牌组中的随机1张卡复制加入手牌
若[purple]「疏远」[/purple]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
复制的卡能免费打出1次
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_COCO_AFFINITY.title: 认可的目光
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_COCO_AFFINITY.descript:
[color=#ff9966][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]
根据敌人意图获得增益，攻击意图：全体友方获得30硬化外壳，防御/增益意图：获得9仪式，减益意图：全体友方获得5人工制品
若[color=#ff9966]「亲近」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
随机再获得1个额外意图效果
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_COCO_ESTRANGEMENT.desc:
[color=#ff9966][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
根据目标意图施加减益，攻击意图：缩小，防御/增益意图：脆弱，减益意图：虚弱+易伤
若[color=#ff9966]「疏远」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
所有效果对全体敌人生效
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_AFFINITY.title: 追向那个人
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_AFFINITY.descripti:
[color=#6666cc][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]
选择牌组 {PickCount:diff()}张卡，将其费用随机变为0~2费
若[color=#6666cc]「亲近」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
变为0费
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_ESTRANGEMENT.title: 致命的洗脑
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_ANN_ESTRANGEMENT.descr:
[color=#6666cc][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
对目标施加2层虚弱和2层脆弱
若[color=#6666cc]「疏远」[/color]>[color=#ff99cc]「亲近」[/color]
额外造成疏远值乘{DamageMult:diff()}点伤害
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_POWERTWOTWOCARD.de: 100层[b]【魔女化】[/b]可用，获得{RitualCeremonyPower:diff()}层[b]【魔女仪式】[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_SUSPECT_SPREAD.des:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，每有1层自身[b]【嫌疑】[/b]伤害+1
给目标和自身各施加1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_TWO.title: 罪之前置
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_SEVEN.title: 共犯
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_SEVEN.description: 给予友方3张{IfUpgraded:show:罪之前置+|罪之前置}
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_THREE.title: 逆转魔染
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_THREE.description: 降低一个友方{Reduction:diff()}层[b]【魔女化】[/b]，抽取{Draw:diff()}张卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_GUILTY_CHAIN.title: 罪链
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_GUILTY_CHAIN.descr: 每回合当你对有[b]【嫌疑】[/b]的敌人打出牌时，随机给另一名敌人施加1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，每回合最多触发2次
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_ONE.title: 罪疑蚀骨
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_ONE.description: 使敌人获得{SuspectPower:diff()}层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]和虚弱
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_EIGHT.title: 脱罪
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMA_EIGHT.description: 失去1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，获得{Block:diff()}点格挡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MLYM.title: 佐伯米莉亚
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MLYM.description: 选择1个队友给予[color=#cc9966]【佐伯米莉亚的魔法】[/color]，交换你们的手牌然后给这些手牌附上[color=#cc9966]【魔法的遗症】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMONV.title: 魔女审判
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMONV.description: 选择获得亲近还是疏远，生成一张[color=#339966]【[/color][color=#cc9966]审[/color][color=#6699cc]判[/color][color=#339966]】[/color]附魔卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMONVQINJIN.title: 魔女审判
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMONVSHUYUAN.title: 魔女审判
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_XUESHUYUANCARD.title: 错乱的记忆
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_XUESHUYUANCARD.descrip:
[color=#cccccc][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
回合开始时交换
[color=#ff99cc][b]【亲近】[/b][/color]与[color=#CC6666][b]【疏远】[/b][/color]
的数值
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_XUEQINJINCARD1.title: 独自的记忆
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_XUEQINJINCARD1.descrip:
[color=#cccccc][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
造成3点伤害，将1张手牌变化为随机[color=#cccccc]【疏远】[/color]牌并添加保留
若[color=#cccccc]「疏远」[/color]>7本卡变化
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_XUEQINJINCARD2.title: 三人的回忆
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_XUEQINJINCARD2.descrip:
[color=#cccccc][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]
打出时生成三张零费随机[color=#cccccc]【[/color][color=#ff99cc]亲[/color][color=#CC6666]近[/color][color=#cccccc]】[/color]卡，可选择一张加入手卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAWICHPOWER.title: 魔女之力
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAWICHPOWER.descripti:
[color=#ff99cc][jitter]「我听到了一个声音，让我把魔女......大量屠杀」[/jitter][/color]
100层[b]【魔女化】[/b]可用
获得2层[b]【魔女仪式】[/b]，获得1层无实体，获得[purple]【死神形态】[/purple]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_LAMORT.title: 死神
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_LAMORT.description:
[color=#ff99cc][jitter]「既没能帮助她，也没能为她发声，我是单纯在一旁看着的————旁观者!」[/jitter][/color]
获得100层[b]【魔女化】[/b]，1层[b]【魔女仪式】[/b]，[color=#cccccc]传播[/color]1/4的[color=#ff99cc]【魔女因子】[/color]
选择获得3点[color=#ff99cc]【羁[/color][color=#CC6666]绊】[/color]，生成等量[color=#339966]【[/color][color=#cc9966]审[/color][color=#6699cc]判[/color][color=#339966]】[/color]牌，按照[color=#ff99cc]【羁[/color][color=#CC6666]绊】[/color]较低值随机变成零费，可选择变成[color=#ff99cc]【羁[/color][color=#CC6666]绊】[/color]卡并自由放入抽牌堆
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIROSHUYUANCARD.title: 我讨厌你的事实永远都不会改变
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_HIROSHUYUANCARD.descri:
[color=#CC6666][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]
[color=#CC6666][sine]「我讨厌你的事实永远都不会改变」[/sine][/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_LYQINJIN.title: 共同的战线
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_LYQINJIN.description:
[gold][b]「亲近」[/b][/gold]
选择一个友方目标，你和目标减少1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]，然后给予随机敌人等量[b]【嫌疑】[/b]
若[gold]「亲近」[/gold]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
目标额外减少1层[b]【嫌疑】[/b]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_YALISA.title: 别再缠着我了
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_YALISA.description:
[color=#ff0000][b]「亲近」[/b][/color]与[color=#ff0000][b]「疏远」[/b][/color]+1
若[color=#ff0000]「亲近」[/color]与[color=#ff0000]「疏远」[/color]之和>6
此卡变化为[color=#ff99cc]「我不听，我需要你」[/color]返回手卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_YALISAQINJIN.title: 我不听，我需要你
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_YALISAQINJIN.descripti: [color=#ff0000][sine]「你这家伙，不是才吃了亏，还不长记忆吗。我的魔法很危险的!」[/sine][/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_LYSHUYUAN.title: 暗藏的嫉妒
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_LYSHUYUAN.description:
[gold][b]「疏远」[/b][/gold]
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害，消耗较高方的[color=#ff99cc]【羁[/color][color=#CC6666]绊】[/color]值，升级牌组中等量的[color=#ff99cc]【羁[/color][color=#CC6666]绊】[/color]卡
若[gold]「亲近」[/gold]>[color=#ff99cc]「疏远」[/color]
可以选择卡组相当于消耗数值的卡变成随机升级后的[gold]【疏远】[/gold]卡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMLYM.title: 佐伯米莉亚
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAMLYM.description: 选择1个队友给予[color=#cc9966]【佐伯米莉亚的魔法】[/color]，交换你们的手牌然后给这些手牌附上[color=#cc9966]【魔法的遗症】[/color]
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_RANDOMTRIALENCHANTCARD: 回合开始，随机使卡组中 {Stacks:diff()} 张没有附魔的卡获得[color=#339966]【[/color][color=#cc9966]审[/color][color=#6699cc]判[/color][color=#339966]】[/color]附魔
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MONVQIUFAN.title: 魔女囚犯
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_MONVQIUFAN.description: 本回合内获得6层力量，5层敏捷，9层格挡
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAREVOKATION.title: 魔女化
MANOSABA_LIN_CARD_EMAREVOKATION.descript:
降低3点血量上限，造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害
可选择抽牌堆、弃牌堆或手牌中的1张[color=#ff99cc]【魔女杀手】[/color]消耗，移除自身的[color=#ff99cc]【魔女杀手】[/color]能力
若成功消耗卡牌或移除能力，加入1张[b]保留[/b]的[color=#ff99cc]【死神】[/color]进入手牌
